---
title: "The Shape of Knowledge: The Mundaneum by Paul Otlet and Henri La Fontaine"
author: "Mariabruna Fabrizi"
date: "2019-05-05"
date-added: "2026-04-15"
categories: [architecture, knowledge, history, information, urbanism]
status: to-read
url: "https://socks-studio.com/2019/05/05/the-shape-of-knowledge-the-mundaneum-by-paul-otlet-and-henri-la-fontaine/"
---

An essay on the Mundaneum, Paul Otlet and Henri La Fontaine's visionary project for a universal repository of world knowledge — a proto-internet conceived in Brussels at the turn of the twentieth century.

[Read the full article →](https://socks-studio.com/2019/05/05/the-shape-of-knowledge-the-mundaneum-by-paul-otlet-and-henri-la-fontaine/)
